commentaries.author: Cyprian of Carthage
commentaries.content: "To speak ill of no man, nor to be litigious."

commentaries.author: John Chrysostom
commentaries.content: Unto Greeks and Jews, to the wicked and the evil. For when he says, Let him that stands take heed lest he fall, he wakens their fears from the future; but here, on the contrary, he exhorts them from the consideration of the past, and the same in what follows;
